notes.title: Organization and Operations
notes.content: ESH Strategies Franchise LLC formed as Delaware LLC on 9/16/2010. Sole member is ESH Hospitality Strategies LLC. On 6/16/2021, Extended Stay America Inc sold 100% interest in the Member to Eagle Strategies Holdings LLC. Company franchises extended stay hotels under three brands: ESA Suites, ESA Select Suites, ESA Premier Suites.

notes.title: Basis of Presentation and Summary of Significant Accounting Policies

policies.use_of_estimates: Significant estimates for useful lives of intangible assets
policies.cash_equivalents: Cash on hand, demand deposits, short-term investments with original maturities ≤3 months. Deposits exceed $250K FDIC limit with one institution.
policies.accounts_receivable: Franchise fees, system service fees, reimbursements. Allowance for credit losses when collection doubtful. Historical collection activity and business forecasts used. Allowance immaterial at 12/31/2024 and 12/31/2023.
policies.contract_acquisition_costs: Direct incremental costs to obtain contracts. Amortized straight-line over initial non-cancellable term or expected contract life. Included in G&A. Reviewed for impairment — no material impairment 2024 or 2023.
policies.net_investment_in_leases: Sales-type leases with certain franchisees for IT equipment, 5-year terms fully maturing in 2025. Lessee purchase option believed reasonably certain to exercise. No interest income recognized (sales price = carrying value).
policies.intangible_assets: Franchise agreements (20-year useful life) and software licenses (non-cancellable contract term). Amortized straight-line. Software license fees may vary based on available rooms at franchised hotels. Liability remeasured at each reporting date. $0.5M current, $1.2M/$1.5M non-current license fees payable. No impairment charges 2024 or 2023.
policies.revenue_recognition_franchise_fees: Initial fees deferred and recognized over expected contract life. Ongoing royalties (% of monthly revenue) recognized over time as franchisees derive value from IP license.
policies.revenue_recognition_system_services: Direct costs: reimbursed dollar-for-dollar, recognized gross. Indirect costs (marketing, tech, reservations, national sales, revenue management): funded by SSF (% of revenue), recognized over time. Single performance obligation combining IP access + system services. Output method based on performance completed. Variable consideration — most likely amount method.
policies.other_revenues: Miscellaneous fees, QA penalties, pre-opening/admin activities. Contract termination fees: $2.1M (2024), $0.2M (2023). Recognized when event occurs.
policies.income_taxes: LLC not subject to federal income taxes. May be subject to state/local taxes in certain jurisdictions.

notes.title: Brand Launch Expenses
notes.description: In 2022, $2.5M incurred for ESA Select Suites brand launch — payments to existing franchisees for area-of-protection exemptions. Mostly satisfied through net reduction in franchise fees.

notes.title: Customer Contracts
notes.performance_obligations: Franchise fees and SSF considered sales-based or wholly unsatisfied series. Expected satisfaction over 20-year franchise terms.

manager.relationship: Non-economic, non-member co-managers affiliated with entities owning Eagle Strategies

accounting_policy_summary.impairment: Reviewed annually or when indicators present; no charges recognized
accounting_policy_summary.income_tax: Not subject to federal income tax (LLC pass-through)
accounting_policy_summary.lease_accounting: Sales-type leases for IT equipment; maturing 2025
accounting_policy_summary.related_party: Fundamental to operations — auditor emphasis of matter
accounting_policy_summary.advertising_fund: No separate advertising fund; SSF is general services fee
